expectations.evidence: Multiple references: 'Since the Flex-BV Act (Wet vereenvoudiging en flexibilisering bv-recht), which entered into force on 1 October 2012' and 'Since the introduction of the Flex-BV on 1 October 2012, the Dutch BV has no minimum share capital. The previous minimum of EUR 18,000 was abolished. Shares can now be issued with a nominal value as low as EUR 0.01 per share'.

Extensive references throughout: 'BW Boek 2, Titel 6 (Art. 2:175–2:284a BW)', 'Art. 2:175 BW', 'Art. 2:177 BW', 'Art. 2:239 BW', 'Art. 2:242 BW', 'Art. 2:216 BW', 'Art. 2:250 BW', 'Art. 2:344–2:359 BW'.

Entire section '4. Content of the Aandeelhoudersovereenkomst (Shareholders' Agreement / SHA)' with comprehensive coverage including: 'The aandeelhoudersovereenkomst (SHA) is a contractual agreement between the shareholders'.
Section '3. KVK Registration': 'Under the Handelsregisterwet 2007, the BV must be registered at the Kamer van Koophandel (KVK) within 8 days of incorporation.' Also in practical requirements table.
